titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 232: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 232. (A.R. No. 57 of 1918.) VRIDDHĀCHALAM, VRIDDHACHALAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, Vriddhagirīśvara temple.

It records that a village Mūlakkuḍi, had been assigned as kuḍinīkka-dēvadānam after demarcating the boundaries as dēvadāna by the king Uttamachōḷa and entrusted to two persons Aruḷaṉ Siṅgaṉ and Guṇavaṉ Maṉimalan. Out of the land allotted to them, during the reign of Rājarāja I (988 A.D.) seven mā of land in Vēppanchey (possibly a block of land distinguished by the presence of Margosa trees in it) an another one mā in Madhurāntaka-viḷāgam were entrusted as kāṇi along with a house site to Pāradāyaṉ Kumaranārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ alias Tirumudukuṉṟa Irāśasiṅga Misuṇṇi enjoining him to supply sandal paste and the incense powder for the daily use of the deity and for the ingredients of the sacred bath on the days of Uttarāyaṇa and Dakshiṇāyana days as well as on the days of Saṅkrānti every month to the God at Tirumudukuṉṟam, a hamlet of Neṟkkuppai in Paruvūr-kūṟṟam in Iruṅgōḷappāḍi.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIII. No. 52.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirājakesaripatmarkku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu Iruṅkoḷappāṭip paruvūrkkūṟṟattu neṟkkuppai
tirumutukuṉṟamuṭaiyārkku śrī Uttamacoḻar devatāṉamāka piṭākai naṭatta nilamūlakkuṭi Aruḷaṉ ciṅkaṉum kuṇavaṉ maṉimala
num Ikkuṭi Ivvaṉaivom nāṅkaḷ śrīuttamacoḻariṭai kuṭi nikkākāṇiyākap peṟṟuṭaiya devatāṉam nirnilam
veppañceyyil leḻu māvum madhurān=taka viḷākattil leṅkaḷ kūṟṟil loru māvum Āka Eṭṭu mācceyyum Ivaṉ Aṭṭu
peṟṟuṭaiya maṉaiyum pūmiyum pāratāyan kumaranārāyaṇappaṭṭaṉākiya tirumutukuṉṟa Irācaciṅka micuṇṇi
kku kāṇiyāka can=tirātittaval niṟkac ceytu kuṭuttom neṟkuppai Ūrom Eṭṭumāccey nir nilam koṇṭu ceyyu
m paṇiyāvatu . niccamaraippalac cantaṇamum nicatam kaiycu kuṅkiliyamum Uttaramayanamum dekṣiṇamayaṉamum tiṅkaḷ ca
ṅkirān=tikku snapanadravyattukkumākac ceytu kuṭuttom mulakkuṭi Ivvaṉaivom kumaranārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉākiya tirumutukuṉṟa mi
cuṇikku cantrātittavalam Itupanmaā(o)heśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
